---
name: Security report
about: Do not file public security issues
title: "[Security]: Do not post details publicly"
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Please do not report security vulnerabilities in a public issue.

Follow `SECURITY.md` and contact the maintainer privately. Do not paste secrets,
tokens, signing credentials, private endpoints, logs with credentials, or exploit
details here.

For non-sensitive install or Doctor issues, use the bug report template and keep
logs redacted.
